summary: All 3 bug fixes verified working. Bug 1 (Signal Completion Error): Backend POST /api/signals/{id}/complete now correctly accepts {notes: ''} body only (signal_id from URL path). 8/8 backend tests passed. Bug 2 (Calendar Picker): CalendarContent renders inline as overlay inside Add Signal modal with month navigation, day selection, and Smart Default button all working. Bug 3 (Ghost Modal): After calendar interaction, navigation tabs (Daily, Dashboard, Community, CRM, Profile) remain clickable - no ghost modal blocking.

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow' - cosmetic only

seed_data_creation: Created test signals during backend testing (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs from user report are fixed: (1) Signal completion API now works with body {notes:''} only - signal_id comes from URL path param, not body. (2) CalendarContent component (no Modal wrapper) is used inside signal modals as absolute-positioned overlay. (3) Ghost modal issue eliminated by using CalendarContent instead of CalendarPicker (which had its own Modal wrapper causing nested modals).

bug1_signal_completion.root_cause: SignalCompletionInput Pydantic model had signal_id field that caused 422 validation error since signal_id comes from URL path
bug1_signal_completion.fix: Removed signal_id from SignalCompletionInput - now only has optional notes field
bug1_signal_completion.frontend_verification: completeSignal() in today.tsx now sends only {notes: ''} without signal_id in body

bug2_calendar_picker_in_modal.root_cause: CalendarPicker component used nested Modal inside Add Signal Modal, causing touch event issues on mobile
bug2_calendar_picker_in_modal.fix: Replaced CalendarPicker with CalendarContent (no Modal wrapper) rendered as absolute-positioned overlay inside existing modal
ui_tests: Clicking Due Date button shows CalendarContent overlay
Day selection highlights and closes calendar

bug3_ghost_modal_blocking.root_cause: CalendarPicker's Modal wrapper would block touch events even when invisible after closing
bug3_ghost_modal_blocking.fix: Using inline CalendarContent eliminates the nested Modal issue entirely
ui_tests: After calendar interaction, modal close button works
After calendar interaction, navigation tabs (Daily, Dashboard, CRM) are clickable
No invisible overlay blocking button clicks

code_files_reviewed./app/backend/server.py: SignalCompletionInput at line 404-405 has only notes field. complete_signal endpoint at line 1831 accepts signal_id from URL path.
code_files_reviewed./app/frontend/app/(tabs)/today.tsx: CalendarContent import at line 14. Inline calendar overlays at lines 938-946 (Add Signal) and 1147-1154 (Edit Signal). completeSignal at line 162-168.
code_files_reviewed./app/frontend/src/components/CalendarPic: CalendarContent (lines 29-114) exports standalone calendar UI. CalendarPicker (lines 121-129) wraps CalendarContent in Modal for use outside other modals.
